description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, angular headband and large, cushioned ear cups. The headband features a geometric, segmented design with three prominent pads on the underside for comfort. The ear cups are circular and thick, connected to the headband by visible, thin support wires and a sturdy hinge mechanism. The headphones have a sleek, modern appearance with a combination of matte and glossy finishes, primarily in dark gray and black tones with subtle red accents. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort for extended use. No visible branding or control interfaces are present on the exterior.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear headphones with a geometric headband, large cushioned ear cups, and a sleek dark finish with red accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large ear cups, the angular headband, and the three comfort pads underneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cup, the hinge, and the thin support wires connecting the cup to the headband.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the ear cups and the headband's structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same details of the ear cup and support structure.
